rules.label: Next-day access
rules.rule: Unconfirmed next-day slots must be chased before 16:00 to protect technician capacity.

rules.label: High-risk walls
rules.rule: At-risk smart wall visits require kit staging, access confirmation and proof gate review.

rules.label: Capacity guardrail
rules.rule: Keep each technician below 80% planned minutes unless the visit is tied to renewal risk.

blackouts.label: Typhoon standby buffer
blackouts.impact: Avoid non-critical visits and preserve same-day rescue capacity.
